achievements.title: Beyond Batman
achievements.description: Get 8 energy capsules and become invincible!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Bat-Nuke
achievements.description: Use Golden Batman's powerful charged attack in stage 4-1!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Bat in the Belfry
achievements.description: Defend Gotham Cathedral by defeating Ace Ranger and his airship!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: A Bat-Jetpack!?
achievements.description: Destroy the Joker's weapons stockpiles!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Batman on Ice
achievements.description: Foil the Joker's mining scheme by defeating his Minedroid!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Deja Vu
achievements.description: Shut down the Joker's explosives refinery by taking out the Master CPU!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Sewer Surfin'
achievements.description: Make your way to the Joker's missile silo through the Gotham sewers!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: The Army's a Joke
achievements.description: Put a stop to the Joker's deadly plans and defeat his flying machine!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Outer Heaven
achievements.description: Chase the Joker to his island hideout and take him out, once and for all!
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Ace of Aces
achievements.description: Defeat Ace Ranger in stage 1 without taking damage.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Jetpack Master
achievements.description: Clear stage 2 with full health.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Batman & Robot
achievements.description: Defeat the Joker's Minedroid in stage 3 without taking damage.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Oracle? Who Needs Her?
achievements.description: Defeat the Master CPU in stage 4 with 70,000 or more health remaining.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Frogman
achievements.description: Clear stage 5 with full health.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: The Killing Joke
achievements.description: Defeat the Joker's flying machine in stage 6 with 75,000 or more health remaining.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Gargoyle
achievements.description: Clear the Gotham Cathedral, stage 1-1, without taking damage.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: The Batman's Natural Habitat
achievements.description: Clear the City Rooftops, stage 1-2, without taking damage.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: More Slippery Than You Look
achievements.description: Clear the Ice Valley, stage 3-1, without taking damage.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: Pizza Power
achievements.description: Clear the Sewer System, stage 5-1, without taking damage.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: One Last Laugh
achievements.description: Defeat the Joker in stage 7 with any weapon other than the Crossbow (C).
achievements.author: FernandoFFS

achievements.title: I Am the Night!
achievements.description: Defeat the Joker in stage 7 with two lives remaining.
achievements.author: FernandoFFS
